title: penstemon montanus
intro: Penstemon montanus, also known as the Rocky Mountain Penstemon, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Penstemon montanus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of Penstemon montanus often involve drying the leaves and stems to make tea, or using the plant in tincture or infusion form to harness its medicinal properties.
